caption: A presentation slide titled "Enterprise Adoption" is displayed, featuring a stylized blue and green hummingbird logo on the left. To the right of the logo is a grid of company logos, including "aws", "Google Cloud", "Microsoft", "DigitalOcean", "logdna", "DATADOG", "sumo logic", "New Relic.", "arm", "lyft", "TREND Micro", "LinkedIn", "vmware", "Walmart", "transit", "SignalFx", "HUMO", and "Giant Swarm". In the upper right corner of the screen, a small inset video shows a woman with dark hair wearing a light-colored top. Across the sequence of frames, the slide remains static, and the woman in the inset remains in the same position and pose, indicating a still moment or a very subtle movement during a presentation.
